headline: Carnival Cuts Costs, Protects Margins: Can It Drive More Upside?
summary: CCL is boosting margins through cost controls, fleet investments and record bookings despite geopolitical and demand headwinds.

raw.headline: Carnival Cuts Costs, Protects Margins: Can It Drive More Upside?

headline: From Contrarian Bets to Steady Income: Ranking 3 Miller-Style Stocks for Retirees
summary: Bill Miller beat the market for 15 straight years by betting on misunderstood companies when everyone else ran scared. Three stocks carry that same contrarian DNA, but only one of them belongs anywhere near a retirement portfolio.

raw.headline: From Contrarian Bets to Steady Income: Ranking 3 Miller-Style Stocks for Retirees
raw.summary: Bill Miller beat the market for 15 straight years by betting on misunderstood companies when everyone else ran scared. Three stocks carry that same contrarian DNA, but only one of them belongs anywhere near a retirement portfolio.
